text: I was preparing the audit report.
I was presenting when the system crashed.
While I was talking, Ethan was taking notes.
What were you doing this morning?
I was reviewing the data when Ethan called.
The team were preparing the report all morning.
While I was presenting, the system crashed.
We were not expecting so many questions.
Murielle, you look tired. What was happening this morning?
It was hectic. I was preparing the audit report when the system suddenly crashed.
Oh no. What were the others doing?
The team was calling IT, and meanwhile Diana was calming the auditors.
Almost. The crisis was unfolding fast, but gradually things got back to normal.
They arrived unexpectedly, midway through the chaos. But we were still smiling.

Let me tell you about yesterday morning. It was completely hectic. At nine, I was preparing the audit report when the system suddenly crashed. Meanwhile, the recruiters were interviewing candidates in the next room, and two meetings were running simultaneously. While I was calling IT, the auditors arrived unexpectedly. There was a real commotion in the corridor. Gradually, though, things were calming down. By eleven, the crisis was no longer unfolding, and everyone was smiling again. It was chaos, but we handled it as a team.

Good afternoon. I want to describe what was happening during the incident last week. It was a hectic day. While the team was running the onboarding session, a fire alarm went off unexpectedly. People were leaving the building, and meanwhile I was checking that everyone was safe. The situation was unfolding very fast. A few staff were still working when the alarm rang, so I was guiding them out. Gradually, the commotion was fading, and the auditors, who were visiting that day, stayed calm. Nobody was hurt, and by the afternoon we were back to normal.
At nine, I was preparing the audit report.
While I was calling IT, the auditors arrived.
We were not expecting so many questions.
What were you doing at three p.m.?
I was preparing the audit report.
I was presenting when the system crashed.
While I was talking, Ethan was taking notes.
What were you doing this morning?
